events.event_name: No AI capability event assigned to Wave 8 full-domain bridge
events.event_description: This registry records that anx_us_2026w08_full_domain_bridge is a non-event psychometric bridge wave for full-domain validation across all seven ANX-Bench domains. It is intentionally not anchored to a frontier model release, capability demonstration, labor-market announcement, deepfake incident, misinformation incident, surveillance deployment, safety incident, regulatory action, public infrastructure event, benchmark release, or any other time-localized AI event. The registry is locked so Wave 8 responses cannot later be retrofitted into an event-study, capability-shock, before-after, baseline, follow-up, trend, or causal exposure design after outcome inspection.
